metadata.name: Iligan Mohring Custom Route Templates
metadata.source_note: Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] barangay/location anchor points for Mohring custom route templates. They are not official LTFRB franchise geometries. The calibration script snaps these anchors to the CityGraph and uses CityGraph shortest paths to build valid closed Layer-2 routes. A 42-route set was added by extending the 32-route set with 10 additional template routes.
metadata.recommended_use: Use with mohring_stability_calibration.py in custom route mode.

routes.name: R00 Tubod Tibanga
routes.note: Template route anchors; actual graph route is snapped/stitched by the calibration code.
